prestazioni: Replace the stock AMC 360 V8 (engine code: 401-12) with a forged rotating assembly from Eagle Specialty Products, featuring a 4.125" stroke crankshaft, H-beam connecting rods (6.125" length), and forged aluminum pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio) to handle forced induction reliably.

Install a custom-built centrifugal supercharger system using a Vortech V-3 Si-Trim blower (8 psi boost) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold designed by Edelbrock for the AMC 360, paired with a Holley Sniper EFI system (4150 flange) for precise fuel delivery and timing control.

Upgrade the valvetrain with a Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H hydraulic roller camshaft (236°/242° duration at .050", .540"/.562" lift) and matching lifters, along with Manley stainless steel 2.02"/1.60" valves, PAC Racing valve springs, and titanium retainers for high-RPM stability.
estetica: Fit a custom widebody conversion kit by Muscle Car Restomods, designed specifically for the Hornet SC/360, with bolt-on fiberglass fenders (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear) and a custom front splitter with integrated brake cooling ducts.

Install a retro-modern aero package featuring a carbon fiber rear wing by DSE (Detroit Speed Engineering) with a 3-piece adjustable design, paired with a custom aluminum hood by Goodmark Industries featuring a functional cowl induction scoop and louvered heat extractors.

Apply a custom paint scheme using BASF Glasurit 90-Line in "Hemi Orange" with blacked-out trim, including a satin black roof wrap by 3M, and add period-correct decals from YearOne, including the original "SC/360" badging and a custom "401-12" engine code badge on the fenders.
